# VV | WebApps Portal

A unified browser-based workspace for real-time MIDI processing plugins and native low-latency AudioWorklet synthesis.

## Core Entrypoints
- Host Application: [App.jsx](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/core/App.jsx)
- Audio Rompler Engine: [engine.js](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/core/rompler/engine.js) (Native AudioContext & voice router)
- Custom DSP Processor: [RomplerWorklet.js](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/public/RomplerWorklet.js)
- Application Registry: [appRegistry.js](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/config/appRegistry.js)
- Shared Memory Ring Buffer: [RingBuffer.js](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/core/utils/RingBuffer.js)

## Active Modules & Plugins
- [Chord Notator](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/chord-notator)
- [Pitch Class Matrix](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/pitch-class-matrix)
- [MIDI Monitor](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/monitor)
- [MIDI Dynamics](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/dynamics)
- [MIDI Transposer](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/src/plugins/midi-transposer)

## Technical Reference
- Architecture details, recent changes, and regressions: [PROJECT_STATE.md](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/PROJECT_STATE.md)
- User Documentation & Installation: [README.md](file:///Users/vv2024/Documents/Repos%20-%20vv2024/MIDI/WebApps/midi-web-apps-portal/README.md)
